case_title: HERRERA, RAYMUNDA VS MENA OSCAR DBA "HORIZONTE TRAVEL"

docket_entries.description: CERT. RECEIPT TO OSCAR MENA DBA HORIZONTES TRAVEL RETURNED SIGNED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $750.88 AS TO DEFENDANT MENA OSCAR DBA "HORIZONTE TRAVEL"

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERRERA, RAYMUNDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENA OSCAR DBA "HORIZONTE TRAVEL" $800.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $800.00, THE AMOUNT OF $400 TO BE PAID ON 3/16/93 AND $400 TO BE PAID ON 3/30/93 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MENA OSCAR DBA "HORIZONTE TRAVEL"
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY HERRERA, RAYMUNDA AS TO DEFENDANT MENA OSCAR DBA "HORIZONTE TRAVEL" ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
